activities_projects.title: Permanent Settlement Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Understand how the Permanent Settlement system worked
steps: Write the main aim of the Permanent Settlement
Explain the role of zamindars in this system
Write one advantage and one disadvantage of the system
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the working of Permanent Settlement

activities_projects.title: Revenue Systems Comparison
steps: Write two features of the Permanent Settlement
Write two features of the Ryotwari system
Write one difference between the two systems

activities_projects.title: Peasant Condition Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the condition of peasants under British rule
steps: Write three problems faced by peasants under the revenue system
Explain why peasants often borrowed money from moneylenders
Write how this affected their lives
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands social impact of revenue systems

activities_projects.title: Indigo Cultivation Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Learn how indigo farming was organised
steps: Write how indigo planters forced peasants to grow indigo
Explain the system of advance loans
Write one problem peasants faced due to indigo cultivation

activities_projects.title: Indigo Revolt Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the causes of the Indigo Revolt
steps: Write two reasons for the Indigo Revolt
Explain how peasants protested against the planters
Write one result of the revolt

activities_projects.title: Historical Source Interpretation
steps: Read a source or statement from the chapter
Write what the source tells about indigo farmers
Explain why such sources are important for historians

activities_projects.title: Revenue Collection Role Play
activities_projects.objective: Understand relationships between peasants, zamindars and British officials
steps: Divide students into groups representing peasants, zamindars and officials
Act out how revenue was collected
Discuss the difficulties faced by each group

activities_projects.title: Picture Analysis of Indigo Farming
steps: Observe an illustration related to indigo farming
Write what activities are shown
Explain what it tells about working conditions

activities_projects.title: Cause and Effect Chart
activities_projects.objective: Understand cause and effect in historical events
steps: Write causes of indigo cultivation in India
Write effects on peasants and agriculture
Connect them using arrows

activities_projects.title: Mini Research on Indigo Dye
activities_projects.objective: Learn about the importance of indigo dye in trade
steps: Find out why indigo dye was important in Europe
Write how it was produced in India
Explain why synthetic dyes later affected indigo production
